purpose: Use this as the chat-first authoritative Pi Protocol package builder; it accepts natural-language build requests, supports resumable delegated conversation via conversationToken, returns typed clarification/completed/unsupported outcomes with explicit continuation ownership, and uses completed both for direct answer/help turns and for certified build turns with runtime verification kept inside the build path.

provides.name: chat_pi_pi
provides.description: Handle a natural-language certified package-building request via input.message, resume delegated conversation with conversationToken when provided, return typed clarification/completed/unsupported outcomes plus explicit continuation ownership, answer directly when no build is needed, and include runtime-verified build details when build work completes. Use message, not text/prompt/query.
